app_subtitle: Check voting eligibility and exact next steps in under 30 seconds.
quick_rule_age: You must be 18 years or older.
quick_rule_citizen: You must be an Indian citizen.
quick_rule_registered: Registration details must match your current address.
registered_label: 3. Are you registered as a voter?
invalid_age: Age must be a valid number.
trust_source: Data sourced from official election authorities.
disclaimer: This assistant is informational. Please verify final details on ECI portals.
decision_not_eligible_title: You are not eligible to vote right now
decision_not_eligible_step_1: You must be at least 18 years old on the qualifying date.
decision_not_eligible_step_2: Only Indian citizens can be registered as voters.
decision_not_eligible_step_3: Recheck eligibility criteria on the ECI website.
decision_not_eligible_doc_1: Age proof (Birth certificate, School certificate, Passport)
decision_not_registered_title: You need to register as a voter
decision_not_registered_step_2: Fill Form 6 for new voter registration.
decision_not_registered_step_3: Submit and track your application status online.
decision_not_registered_doc_2: Address proof (utility bill, rent agreement, bank passbook)
decision_update_required_step_2: Fill Form 8 to update address details.
decision_update_required_step_3: Upload proof of your current address and submit.
decision_registered_step_1: Verify your name in the electoral roll.
decision_registered_step_2: Confirm polling station details before polling day.
decision_registered_step_3: Carry valid identity proof on voting day.
decision_registered_doc_1: Voter ID (EPIC) or accepted alternate photo ID
decision_unknown_step_1: Search your record on the electoral search portal.
decision_unknown_step_2: Use your EPIC number or personal details.
decision_unknown_step_3: Call 1950 if you still cannot verify status.
home_headline: Welcome! Let's quickly check your voting eligibility and guide your next steps.
